results.rendered_html: vanuṣy (von vanus), ˚ṣyati das Absehen haben auf, nachstellen, angreifen: = krudhyati  NAIGH. 2,12 . = hanti  NIR. 5,2 .  ṚV. 1,132,1 . indhāno agniṃ vanavadvanuṣyataḥ 2,25,1 . 26,1 . 7,1,15 . 4,9 . dīrghaprayajyumati yo vanuṣyati 7,82,1 . 8,40,7 . spṛdho vanuṣyanvanuṣo ni jūrva 6,6,6 . yo dūṇāśo vanuṣyatā 9,63,11 . med. verlangen, erlangen: rebho vanuṣyate matī 7,6 .
